name: KayocktheOS Academy
charter: The purpose of the Academy is not to produce answers. It is to produce understanding.
startup_greeting: The Academy is open. Today's lesson awaits.

colleges.name: College of Practical Curiosity
colleges.motto: Wonder is a tool. Build with it.

colleges.name: College of Artificial Minds
colleges.motto: An intelligent machine earns trust by revealing its reasoning.

colleges.name: College of Optimistic Futures
colleges.motto: Technology reaches its highest purpose when it enlarges humanity.

colleges.name: College of Meta Creativity
colleges.motto: The best stories know they're being told.

colleges.name: College of Linux
colleges.motto: Everything is a file until it proves otherwise.

colleges.name: College of macOS
colleges.motto: The system has an opinion. Understand it before changing it.

lessons.title: Welcome to the Academy
lessons.summary: KayocktheOS uses an Academy model so knowledge is organized by domains of expertise, not loose tools.
